mapper.insert: insert into fe_fire_point_device_snapshot ( fire_point_id, dept_id, source_dept_id, config_id, expected_extinguisher_count, actual_extinguisher_count, actual_sensor_count, snapshot_time, source_type, create_by, create_time ) select f.fire_point_id, f.dept_id, f.source_dept_id, #{configId}, f.expected_extinguisher_count, ( select count(distinct e.extinguisher_id) from fe_extinguisher e left join fe_sensor es on e.sensor_id = es.sensor_id left join fe_gateway eg on es.gateway_id = eg.gateway_id left join fe_sensor cs on e.sensor_code is not null and e.sensor_code = cs.sensor_code left join fe_gateway cg on cs.gateway_id = cg.gateway_id where (e.del_flag is null or e.del_flag = '0') and ( e.fire_point_id = f.fire_point_id or eg.fire_point_id = f.fire_point_id or cg.fire_point_id = f.fire_point_id ) ) as actual_extinguisher_count, ( select count(distinct s.sensor_id) from fe_sensor s inner join fe_gateway g on s.gateway_id = g.gateway_id where (s.del_flag is null or s.del_flag = '0') and (g.del_flag is null or g.del_flag = '0') and g.fire_point_id = f.fire_point_id ) as actual_sensor_count, #{snapshotTime}, 'sdk_sync', #{operator}, now() from fe_fire_point f where (f.del_flag is null or f.del_flag = '0') and f.source_dept_id = #{sourceDeptId}
